## Summary

Describe the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is passing.
- [ ] Commit messages or PR title follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] README usage changed if behavior changed.
- [ ] Tests changed if behavior changed.
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` or `docs/decisions/` changed if architecture, release shape, public behavior, or gotchas changed.
- [ ] No manual release tag was created.
- [ ] No manual changelog entry was added unless this is a release-process exception.

## Release impact

Select one:

- [ ] No release impact.
- [ ] Patch: bug fix or performance improvement.
- [ ] Minor: backward-compatible feature.
- [ ] Major: breaking change.
